claim: MG-as-conditional-liability is the load-bearing accounting change.
rationale: Without the reclassification, the deal-shape lockdown wouldn't hold beyond one quarter.

evidence.notes: Embracer Q3 8-K, pp. 14-16: explicit MG reclassification language.
Predicts the structural shift; this Point names the accounting mechanism.

evidence.quote_text: Their Q3 filing rewrote the entire MG line. Nobody on our side missed it.
